Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6) Points And Authorities; Declaration; Order/Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion by plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. to enforce a settlement agreement as a judgment is granted. Bank of America shows that the parties agreed to settlement and agreed that the court could enforce it as a judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6. Defendant Gurgen Abrahamyants has defaulted on the settlement agreement. Bank of America is directed to submit a proposed judgment in the requested amount of $7,115.89.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6) Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

Off calendar. The motion was filed on April 2, 2025, the 13th court day in advance of the hearing. CCP 1005(b) provides that "all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing."

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
